General.Name: China Kangda Food Co Ltd
General.Description: China Kangda Food Company Limited, an investment holding company, produces, processes, sells, and trades food products in the People's Republic of China, Japan, Europe, and internationally. The company operates through Processed Food Products, Chilled and Frozen Rabbit Meat, Chilled and Frozen Chicken Meat, and Other Products segments. It also engages in breeding and sale of livestock, poultry, and rabbits. The company's products include chilled and frozen chicken and rabbit meat; prepared foods; breeding and broiler products; pet food products; and chicken and rabbit meat byproducts. The company was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Qingdao, the People's Republic of China.
General.Address: Kangda Food Industrial Park, Qingdao, China
